title: Music Inquiry What song plays when

wikitext:
[]: Music Inquiry - What song plays when...             Quote Post by xtr00kvltcorex » Thu Aug 19, 2021 1:51 pm Been trying to figure out what song is playing when Misato resolve to sacrifice herself and Wunder. It's a choral number, but my scouring either isn't thorough enough, or it's just not out there yet. Any leads?

[]: Re: Music Inquiry - What song plays when...             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Thu Aug 19, 2021 2:06 pm You must be referring to “ citation from ‘joy to the world’ ”. Edit: there’s “ the path ”, too. But I think this one is not what you are looking for.

[]: Re: Music Inquiry - What song plays when...             Quote Post by xtr00kvltcorex » Thu Aug 19, 2021 5:16 pm It was "the path." thank you
